violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The chemicals for the sanitizing rinse noted not being automatically dispensed.
POISONS/TOXIC MATERIALS AND MEDICINE (3 pts): Chemicals noted not labeled.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): The employee noted eating in food preparation area.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors walls and ceilings in facility noted in need of some cleaning and repair work.
THAWING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (2 pts): Potentially hazardous foods noted not being thawed using approved methods
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food bins noted not properly labeled.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Wall with holes need repair. Floor areas need repair.
